bracket.description: R32 fixture to group position mapping. '1A'=group A winner, '2B'=group B runner-up, '3A/B/C/D'=best third-placed from listed groups. Real team IDs (GER, MEX, USA) = pre-qualified host slots.

description: Raw static data for WC2026 redesign spikes. tournament config is reusable for future World Cups — just swap teams/groups/matches/bracket.
